# terrible_community_proxmox_proxmox_node_network_info (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `node` (String) The Proxmox node to retrieve network interface information from.

### Optional

- `check_changes` (Boolean) Whether to check for pending network configuration changes. When enabled, the module will return only information about any staged changes that are waiting to be applied. When disabled (default), the module will return network interface information. This parameter cannot be used together with `iface` or `iface_type` parameters, as checking for pending changes is a node-level operation.
- `iface` (String) Name of a specific network interface to retrieve information for. If not specified, information for all interfaces will be returned.
- `iface_type` (String) Filter results by interface type.

### Read-Only

- `has_pending_changes` (Boolean) Whether there are any pending network configuration changes
- `pending_changes` (String) Pending network configuration changes
- `proxmox_node_networks` (String) List of network interfaces on the node
